prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 80.4 kg; Height 184.2 cm; BMI 23.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 179mg/dL; 9 months ago 164mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 181mg/dL; current 146mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 82.1kg; 9 months ago 77.1kg; 6 months ago 77.2kg; 3 months ago 76.3kg; current 80.4kg), Height (12 months ago 184.2cm; 9 months ago 184.2cm; 6 months ago 184.2cm; 3 months ago 184.2cm; current 184.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 23.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 89mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 67U/L; 6 months ago 58U/L; 3 months ago 64U/L; current 69U/L), AST (12 months ago 64U/L; 9 months ago 63U/L; 6 months ago 69U/L; 3 months ago 60U/L; current 71U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; current 35mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 114mg/g; 9 months ago 102mg/g; 6 months ago 104mg/g; 3 months ago 129mg/g; current 109mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 84mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 153mg/dL; 3 months ago 153mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.8g/dL; 3 months ago 11.1g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
